summary: Backend testing completed for PVP Tap Synchronization. All 10 tests passed. The critical PVP tap sync endpoints are working correctly - opponent taps and dollar values are properly stored and returned via polling.
critical_code_review_comments: PVP tap sync API endpoints are correctly implemented
POST /api/photo-game/pvp/tap correctly stores taps and calculates dollar values
GET /api/photo-game/pvp/tap-state/{session_id} correctly returns both players' taps and dollar values
The polling fallback mechanism is working as expected for when WebSocket is unreliable
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users with minted photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: PVP tap sync API endpoints verified working. Full flow tested: create game -> join -> ready -> start -> tap submission -> tap state polling. Both players correctly see each other's taps and dollar values via polling. The critical bug (opponent taps showing as $0) is NOT present in the API - the API correctly returns dollar values.

TestBattlePhotos.test_get_battle_photos: PASSED - User 1 has 12 photos, User 2 has 16 photos

verification_results.tap_state_polling: User 2 polled and saw opponent_taps=25, opponent_dollar=$250,000
verification_results.bidirectional_sync: Both players correctly see each other's taps and dollar values
verification_results.critical_bug_status: NOT PRESENT - opponent dollar values are correctly returned (not $0)
